title: CoverMyMeds - Prior Authorization Platform (McKesson)
problem: Prior authorization for medications is manual, time-consuming, and delays patient access to needed treatments. Providers, pharmacists, and payers need efficient electronic prior auth workflows.
solution: Electronic prior authorization platform connecting providers, pharmacists, and payers. Streamlined prior auth submission and processing. Integrated with EHRs and pharmacy systems. Now part of McKesson.
technology: E-prescribing integration, prior auth APIs, EHR integration
traction_signals: Largest prior authorization platform in US
Used by most major health plans
varden_fit: CRITICAL — CoverMyMeds proves electronic prior auth is essential infrastructure. European healthcare systems lack any equivalent platform.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Prior authorization is universally hated but essential. Electronic automation is the only solution. Zero European players.
